query:
SELECT DISTINCT p.club, COUNT(*) as qtd 
FROM players p 
WHERE p.club IN (
  SELECT t.name FROM teams t WHERE t.countryId = 30001
)
GROUP BY p.club
ORDER BY qtd DESC
LIMIT 30;
